IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (28897981.pdf)
SUMMARY: 
SKILLS: Excellent communicator, Adopts technology to business needs, Stays current with technology, Excellent interpersonal skills, MS SharePoint, MS Access, MS Office, Adobe Suite, OS(s) Windows, Linux, Mac, Skype, WebEx, Adobe Connect, MS Lync, Level I, II and III customer Support, Regional System Manager 5, System installs and upgrades of agency software, System Admin 5, Awarded by the Forest Service, Pacific Northwest Research Station for developing publishing innovations, multiple website support, and championing SharePoint., Awarded by the Forest Service, Pacific Northwest Research Station for delivering superb computer assistance to the Communication Application Program, and demonstrated outstanding support to the maintenance of the stations' websites., Key developer and supporter for a new Regional Examination Center(RE) IT support as a Regional System Manager for other 400 workstations, across multiple Coast Guard campus, at remote field stations, and for facilities on ships.
